error_signature: email content received as a single long line
title: Email content not preserving newlines in Telegram
symptom: The content forwarded to Telegram from Gmail appears as a single long line, losing paragraph formatting.
applies_when: Using Gmail Trigger and Gmail nodes
Function node processes email content for Telegram
not_this_if: Email body is already formatted correctly in Telegram
root_cause: The 'Simplify' option in the Gmail nodes causes only a brief snippet of the email to be retrieved, which does not include newlines or full formatting. This results in the loss of paragraph structure when the content is forwarded to Telegram.
fix_steps: Open the settings for both the Gmail Trigger and Gmail nodes
Ensure the Function node processes the full email body correctly
Test the workflow to confirm newlines are preserved in Telegram
agent_instruction: Disable the 'Simplify' option in the Gmail nodes to preserve email formatting.
